sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import './RolePlay.css'; const MOCK_STATS = { totalStories: 12, published: 8, draft: 4, characters: 47, dialogueLines: 384, mostPlayed: 'Restaurant Conversation', avgAccuracy: '78%', }; const MOCK_IMPORTS = [ { id: 1, file: 'daily_scenes_batch1.xlsx', stories: 3, chars: 12, lines: 96, date: '2026-07-18', status: 'success' }, { id: 2, file: 'hospital_pack.xlsx', stories: 1, chars: 3, lines: 24, date: '2026-07-17', status: 'success' }, { id: 3, file: 'airport_n3.xlsx', stories: 2, chars: 8, lines: 60, date: '2026-07-15', status: 'error' }, ]; export default function RolePlayDashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const stats = [ { label: 'Total Stories', value: MOCK_STATS.totalStories, icon: '📖', color: '#BF1B2C' }, { label: 'Published', value: MOCK_STATS.published, icon: '✅', color: '#2D9D4A' }, { label: 'Draft', value: MOCK_STATS.draft, icon: '📝', color: '#F59E0B' }, { label: 'Characters', value: MOCK_STATS.characters, icon: '👤', color: '#6366F1' }, { label: 'Dialogue Lines', value: MOCK_STATS.dialogueLines, icon: '💬', color: '#EC4899' }, { label: 'Avg Accuracy', value: MOCK_STATS.avgAccuracy, icon: '🎯', color: '#0EA5E9' }, ]; return (
{/* Page Header */}

🎭 RolePlay Dashboard

Manage stories, characters, and conversations.

{/* Stats Grid */}
{stats.map(s => (
{s.icon}
{s.value}
{s.label}
))}
{/* Most Played */}
🏆
Most Played Story
{MOCK_STATS.mostPlayed}
{/* Latest Imports */}

📦 Latest Imports

Import New
{MOCK_IMPORTS.map(imp => ( ))}
FileStoriesCharactersLinesDateStatus
📊 {imp.file} {imp.stories} {imp.chars} {imp.lines} {imp.date} {imp.status === 'success' ? '✓ Success' : '✗ Error'}
); }
